headline: Sony’s sloppy Spider-Man universe gets even messier with Spider-Noir
summary: Sony's live-action Spider-Man universe is criticized for sloppiness despite Into the Spider-Verse success. A new Spider-Noir series is set to expand this criticized cinematic universe. The article highlights ongoing issues with Sony's approach to the Spider-Man film rights.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can still shop
summary: Many top Memorial Day deals are still available even after the long weekend. Discounts include portable speakers, solar lights, 4K OLED TVs, and noise-canceling earbuds. Laptops and other tech products are also part of the continuing sales.

headline: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
summary: American Airlines will install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi on over 500 aircraft. Deployment is set to begin in the first quarter of 2027. New Airbus A321XLR and A321neo planes are among those receiving the satellite internet.

headline: Memory V re-creates the Memorymoog without the massive headaches or price tag
summary: Arturia's Memory V emulator replicates the legendary, yet unreliable, Memorymoog synthesizer. It offers the classic massive Moog sound without the vintage hardware's issues or high cost. The original Memorymoog, made from 1982-1985, was Moog's last polyphonic synth.

headline: Get a 2-Pack of 6.6ft USB Type-C Cables for $5.60 ($2.80 Per Cable)
summary: Score a 2-pack of 6.6ft USB Type-C cables for just $5.60. Each cable costs an affordable $2.80, a great deal. These universal cables are perfect for devices like Nintendo Switch 2, Steam Deck, or iPhone 17.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to a New All-Time Low Price Ahead of Memorial Day
summary: The new 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 chip is at an all-time low price. Customers can save $80 compared to buying directly from Apple. This pre-Memorial Day deal offers significant savings on the latest iPad Air.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $380 During the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale
summary: An $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair is now only $380. This massive discount is part of the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale. The deal presents a huge saving, making it a great Father's Day gift idea.

headline: The Baseus 20,000mAh 45W Power Bank With Dual USB-C Cables Drops to $21 After Coupon
summary: Get a Baseus 20,000mAh 45W Power Bank for only $21 after applying a coupon. The power bank includes dual USB-C cables for convenience. It's ideal for charging and playing devices like the Nintendo Switch 2 or Steam Deck simultaneously.

headline: UK's hottest May day record broken for second day in a row
summary: The UK experienced its hottest May day record for the second consecutive day. Temperatures reached a provisional 35.1C in Kew Gardens, south-west London. This marks an unprecedented heatwave for the month of May across the region.

headline: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
summary: Iran has condemned recent US strikes, calling them a "gross violation" of the ceasefire. The US attacks occurred during ongoing peace talks in Doha involving Iranian and Qatari negotiators. This condemnation highlights escalating tensions and jeopardizes diplomatic efforts.

headline: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal
summary: The prime minister has ordered the referral of sentences for boys spared custody over rape to the Court of Appeal. The case involves the rape of two girls in Hampshire, sparking public concern. The referral seeks a review of the non-custodial sentences issued.

headline: Almost 1,000 migrants cross Channel over bank holiday
summary: Nearly 1,000 migrants successfully crossed the English Channel during the recent bank holiday. A total of 989 individuals arrived in the UK via 14 boats. This surge occurred between Friday and Monday, highlighting ongoing migration challenges.
